description: Lang-pack validation: `node scripts/generate-pseudo-locales.cjs && node scripts/validate-translations.cjs` passes for all 9 locales after each namespace update (covers key parity, missing/extra keys, interpolation variables, pseudo-locale patterns, Italian accents). Single check, run on every commit.
Unit: TicketingDashboard.i18n.test — renders page title, add button, filter labels via t() in en
Unit: TicketingDashboard.i18n.test — renders pseudo-locale (xx) for all visible strings, no bare English leakage
Unit: TicketingDashboard.i18n.test — bulk action toast messages interpolate count correctly (1 ticket moved / N tickets moved)
Unit: TicketingDashboard.i18n.test — empty state, loading, error toasts render translated text
Unit: QuickAddTicket.i18n.test — dialog title, field labels, placeholders rendered via t() in en
Unit: QuickAddTicket.i18n.test — validation errors (title required, etc.) appear in current locale
Unit: QuickAddTicket.i18n.test — tag creation failure toast uses interpolation for failed count
Unit: QuickAddTicket.i18n.test — pseudo-locale (xx) covers all visible strings
Unit: TicketInfo.i18n.test — detail header, field labels rendered via t()
Unit: TicketInfo.i18n.test — confirmation dialogs and inline edit prompts translated
Unit: TicketInfo.i18n.test — pseudo-locale coverage
Unit: TicketProperties.i18n.test — side panel labels, status/priority/board select placeholders render via t()
Unit: TicketProperties.i18n.test — board change reselection prompt translated
Unit: TicketProperties.i18n.test — pseudo-locale coverage for inline edit controls
Unit: CategoriesSettings.i18n.test — board/channel scope selector and tree labels translated
Unit: CategoriesSettings.i18n.test — add/edit/delete dialogs render validation messages in current locale
Unit: TicketExportDialog.i18n.test — format options (CSV/XLSX), column picker, date range labels translated
Unit: TicketExportDialog.i18n.test — download failure toast translated
Unit: TicketMaterialsCard.i18n.test — materials list, add dialog, cost labels translated
Unit: TicketMaterialsCard.i18n.test — empty state and delete confirmation translated
Unit: DisplaySettings.i18n.test — column visibility toggles and sort options translated
Unit: DisplaySettings.i18n.test — save/reset button labels translated
Unit: TicketWatchListCard.i18n.test — watcher list, add/remove buttons, empty state translated
Unit: TicketEmailNotifications.i18n.test — notification toggle labels translated
Unit: ResponseStateSelect.i18n.test — All/Awaiting Client/Awaiting Internal/None options translated
Unit: QuickAddCategory.i18n.test — inline creation dialog and validation translated
Unit: TicketDetailsContainer.i18n.test — loading/error/not-found states translated
Unit: CategoryPicker.i18n.test — placeholder, empty state, search label translated
Unit: TicketNavigation.i18n.test — prev/next button aria-labels translated
Unit: TicketOriginBadge.i18n.test — all origin enum values render localized labels
Unit: ResponseSourceBadge.i18n.test — all source enum values render localized labels
Integration: /msp/tickets list loads in en with no hardcoded English visible in the dashboard frame
Integration: /msp/tickets list loads in de with translated page title, add button, filters
Integration: /msp/tickets quick-add dialog renders translated labels in de
Integration: /msp/tickets/[id] detail page renders TicketInfo/TicketProperties/TicketMaterialsCard/TicketWatchListCard in de with no English leakage
Integration: /msp/settings/ticketing renders CategoriesSettings + DisplaySettings in de with translated labels
Integration: /msp/service-requests/[id] editor (which reuses CategoryPicker) renders translated picker in de
Integration: global quick-create dialog (QuickAddTicket reused in layout/QuickCreateDialog) renders translated in de
Integration: bulk move/delete on /msp/tickets shows translated confirmation and toast messages (with count interpolation)
Integration: xx pseudo-locale smoke test across /msp/tickets list, detail, settings renders pseudo-text everywhere

Regression: existing ticket unit tests (TicketDetailsContainer.description.test, TicketInfo.boardChangeStatusReselection.test, TicketProperties.liveTimerPolicy.test, QuickAddTicket.boardScopedStatuses.test, TicketWatchListCard.test, ticket-properties-inline-contact.test, ticket-inline-add-prefill.test, etc.) still pass
Regression: existing ticket render tests (TicketOriginBadge.render, ResponseSourceBadge.render) still pass after badge i18n wiring
Regression: CommentMetadataDebugModal.test still passes after dev-facing translation wiring
Regression: AgentScheduleDrawer.test still passes (re-export shim)
Regression: TicketDetailsContainerCreateTask.test and TicketDetailsCreateTask.test pass (project-tickets integration)
Manual: visual diff on /msp/tickets in en between main and PR branch — no layout shifts from key length differences
Manual: visual diff on /msp/tickets in de — long German strings do not break button/column widths
Manual: verify client-portal ticket views unchanged (CommentItem, TicketConversation, TicketDetails, TicketDocumentsSection remain wired as before)
